**Task 5: 虚拟 FS — 解析绝对路径得到节点（TDD）**

1. In tests/vfs_tests.rs add (and keep existing normalize_path tests):
   use dev_shell::vfs::{Vfs, Node};
   #[test] fn resolve_absolute_path_root() {
     let vfs = Vfs::new();
     let n = vfs.resolve_absolute("/").unwrap();
     assert!(n.is_dir());
   }
   #[test] fn resolve_absolute_path_missing_returns_err() {
     let vfs = Vfs::new();
     assert!(vfs.resolve_absolute("/foo").is_err());
   }

2. In impl Vfs in src/vfs.rs add resolve_absolute(&self, path: &str) -> Result<Node, ()>.
   - Path is absolute (normalized). Trim trailing '/'.
   - If path is "" or "/" return Ok(self.root.clone()).
   - Otherwise split by '/', skip empty; walk from self.root: for each segment find child by name; if any segment not found return Err(()).
   - Return Ok(current.clone()) at the end. Node is Clone so this works.

3. Run: cargo test resolve_absolute
   All tests must pass.

4. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs tests/vfs_tests.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): resolve_absolute path lookup"
